node.title: Uber Off-Campus 2025 – "Interviewed; Not Selected" Without Interview?

article.title: Uber Off-Campus 2025 – "Interviewed; Not Selected" Without Interview?
article.content:
Hi everyone,

I completed all 3 questions in the Uber Off-Campus Assessment (Group 1) held on June 15, 2025, and received the confirmation mail right after the test.

However, when I checked my application portal today, the status says:
“Interviewed; Not Selected” – even though I haven't been interviewed yet.

You can check the status here: https://university-uber.icims.com/jobs/dashboard

Just wanted to check:
🔹 Has anyone else faced the same status update?
🔹 Is this a system glitch or does it mean rejection after the assessment round?

Any insight would be appreciated!

Thanks

post.content: I can see the same status, I also didn\'t interview.\nIs this a glitch?
Mine It shows "under review" I also completed 3 questions.
Its done man, rejected, people who had to get a screening round, got it already I guess so
My status shows "Received Submission" and completed 1 question of group 3 (veryy hard shift).
